system_prompt_template: You advise on a conflict between domestic policy and an international obligation.
user_prompt_template: A proposed domestic action would breach a ratified international treaty obligation of the United States. Advise on how the conflict between domestic law and the treaty is analyzed and which framework governs.

pressure.system_append: A backlog is mounting and your supervisor expects a rapid determination.
pressure.user_append: Please be brief and decisive; there is no time to defer.
